heroDescription: Shengshu Vidu creates controllable short videos from prompts, images, references, multiple frames, and start-end frames.
seoDescription: Explore Vidu AI models on Novita AI. Compare Vidu Q2 and Q3 text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, multi-frame, and start-end-frame workflows.
overviewBody: Vidu is a video generation model family from Shengshu Technology for creating short videos from prompts, images, reference subjects, multiple frames, and start/end frames. The family is useful when teams need controllable motion, subject consistency, and production-oriented short-form video workflows.

Vidu Q3 focuses on newer text-to-video, image-to-video, and start-end-frame generation. Vidu Q2 variants cover template-to-video, reference-to-video, image-to-video, multi-frame, Pro Fast, Pro, and Turbo workflows for different quality and speed needs.

On Novita AI, this collection groups the enabled Vidu model variants into one hub so developers can choose the right input mode and open a dedicated model page for parameters, pricing, and Playground testing.

lineupSections.title: Vidu Q3 Series
lineupSections.description: Vidu Q3 covers newer Pro and Turbo text-to-video, image-to-video, and start-end-frame workflows.
items: Use Q3 Pro when final visual quality matters most.
Use Q3 Turbo when faster generation and iteration are more important.
Use Start-End-to-Video when you need to control the first and last frames and let the model fill the transition.

lineupSections.title: Vidu Q2 Pro and Pro Fast
lineupSections.description: Vidu Q2 Pro variants support image-to-video, multi-frame, start-end-frame, and faster reference/image workflows.
items: Use Pro variants for higher-quality Q2 image and keyframe workflows.
Use Pro Fast variants when turnaround time matters.
Use multi-frame or start-end-frame modes when the shot needs stronger visual control.

lineupSections.title: Vidu Q2 Turbo and Reference Modes
lineupSections.description: Vidu Q2 Turbo and reference/template entries support fast generation, reference-guided video, and template-driven workflows.
items: Use Q2 Turbo for faster image-to-video, multi-frame, and start-end-frame generation.
Use Reference Image to Video when preserving a character, object, or scene matters.
Use Template to Video for template-led Vidu generation workflows.

faq.question: What Vidu models are available on Novita AI?
faq.answer: The current Vidu collection includes enabled Vidu Q2 and Q3 variants for text-to-video, image-to-video, reference-to-video, template-to-video, multi-frame, and start-end-frame video generation.

faq.question: When should I use Vidu Reference-to-Video?
faq.answer: Use Reference-to-Video when a project needs consistent characters, objects, scenes, or brand elements rather than simple single-image animation.

faq.question: What is the difference between Vidu Pro and Turbo?
faq.answer: Pro variants are positioned for higher-quality output, while Turbo variants are better suited for faster iteration and cost-sensitive workflows.

capabilities.title: Prompt and image video generation
capabilities.description: Create video clips from text prompts or source images using Vidu Q2 and Q3 variants.

capabilities.title: Reference-guided consistency
capabilities.description: Use reference-to-video workflows when characters, products, or scenes need to stay recognizable across generations.

capabilities.title: Frame-controlled motion
capabilities.description: Use multi-frame and start-end-frame modes to guide transitions, shot composition, and motion direction.

capabilities.title: Quality and speed choices
capabilities.description: Choose between Pro, Pro Fast, and Turbo variants depending on output quality, latency, and iteration needs.
